_help.what: Deployment paths the workstation gates need. The harness reads only this file for the run's --root/--fileroot, the yaml directory, and the saved-emulator roots; nothing is hardcoded to one machine. This file is machine-portable: it ships with rootdir null (resolved from $ROOTDIR at load) and driver_fileroot 'gates_board', so a fresh clone runs `python ai/gates/run_board.py --check` with no edit. Change a value only for a non-standard deploy.
_help.rootdir: The cocoa $ROOTDIR (the clone root that owns projects/ and external_modules/), used for cobaya-run and for resolving rootdir-relative paths. null = resolve from the $ROOTDIR environment variable at load (the normal case; the file then carries no machine path). A non-null absolute value overrides $ROOTDIR, for a machine whose $ROOTDIR does not point at the clone under test. If null and $ROOTDIR is unset, preflight fails loudly naming the variable. Resolution happens in code at load; the file is never rewritten.
_help.driver_root: The --root value passed to cosmic_shear_train_emulator.py (the deploy root that holds the run's dumps + outputs).
_help.driver_fileroot: The --fileroot value passed to the training driver (the run's file stem). Ships as 'gates_board'. Preflight fails loudly if it is missing, empty, or still wrapped in < > (the shipped-placeholder signature).
_help.yaml_dir: Directory holding cosmic_shear_train_emulator.yaml (the golden legs resolve it by bare name), i.e. the repo's example_yamls. Absolute, or relative to rootdir. The gate_configs smoke YAMLs live under ai/gates/configs and are reached from here as ../ai/gates/configs/<name>.yaml (single-yaml_dir limitation, flagged in the harness handoff).
_help.debug: true = mirror full command output (driver stdout, config dump) to the terminal as well as the gate log; false = the terminal shows only gate headers, CHECK/GATE verdicts, preflight, and the summary. Log files always get everything. The --debug flag forces true.
_help.evaluate_yaml: The cobaya evaluate YAML for cobaya-adapter. Defaults to the board's own ai/gates/configs/cobaya-adapter-evaluate.yaml, which reads the tiny emulator save-rebuild-drift persists; point it at your own copy to evaluate a real trained run.
_help.golden_bases: Per-gate pre-feature commit hash for the byte-identity golden leg, run in a TEMPORARY worktree (never checkout-in-place). ema-off-identity is preset to the pre-EMA commit. A null entry = the gate runs only its functional smoke leg and records the golden leg as skipped (see the harness handoff decision point).
_help.gate_configs: Per-gate bespoke smoke YAML (relative to yaml_dir). A null entry = the gate reports its config missing and is skipped, naming the file to author.
_help.deploy_data: Files used by training checks on the current computer. Each entry gives a short name and a path relative to rootdir. The cosmic-shear checks need the training and validation data vectors, parameter tables, scientific facts files, covariance matrix, and CosmoLike dataset file. A check stops before training if a named entry or file is missing. The .dataset file can refer to nearby data, covariance, mask, and n(z) files; those nearby files are not yet checked separately. Put computer-specific paths in a local copy of this configuration.
